evals.prompt: What hasn't been ingested into the wiki yet?
evals.expected_output: Runs python3 .claude/scripts/check_ingest.py, reports the count of remaining sources and a recommended next one, and does not dump a large queue or read any registry. If the script returns nothing, reports the queue is clear.

Triages source authority, decomposes notes into canonical owner pages with reciprocal links, updates index/log/hot.md as needed, preserves uncertainty, invents no extra plot, archives the source to .raw/<type>/ with archive_source.py --type, commits per source, and never touches a registry.

evals.prompt: Catch up the wiki — process everything in the inbox.
evals.expected_output: Runs check_ingest.py, ingests one source at a time to full quality (no batch-skimming regardless of queue depth), archives + commits each before re-running the script, and continues until check_ingest.py returns nothing. Each source gets full decomposition and cross-linking; quality does not degrade as the queue shrinks.

evals.prompt: Ingest the reviewed clean transcript for session 04.
evals.expected_output: Refuses raw or unresolved transcript ingest, extracts durable session changes, creates or updates the session note, updates affected entity/situation/faction files, then archives the clean transcript to .raw/sessions/ so it drops off check_ingest.py.
